python3 -c "
import csv
with open('/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/opencode_aljazeeraQ12026v37_qwen36plus/26-05-02-00-01-06/agents/minimalHarness_qwen_qwen36-plus_001/workspace/market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)

for r in rows:
    rd = r.get('resolution_date','').strip()
    if rd and rd == '2026-02-12':
        print(f'QID: {r[\"qid\"]}')
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Background: {r[\"background\"][:300] if r[\"background\"] else \"N/A\"}')
        print('---')
"

QID: 304287
Title: Which party will emerge as the main opposition in Bangladesh's new parliament after the 2026 election, based on seat results reported by February 13, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-14. Bangladesh is preparing for a parliamentary election. In a parliament, the main opposition is generally the largest party outside the governing side.
---
QID: 739916
Title: Which aircraft carrier will join the USS Abraham Lincoln carrier strike group in the Middle East by the end of March 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-01. The US Navy moves carrier strike groups between regions to project power, and adding another carrier to the Middle East would significantly increase American military capacity during a regional crisis.
---
QID: 795774
Title: By the end of February 2026, which French city will be identified as the place where a French far-right activist was killed, leading to a public dispute between Emmanuel Macron and Giorgia Meloni?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-31. France and Italy can face diplomatic tension when political leaders comment on violent incidents with ideological significance. A future dispute between the two countries' leaders may center on where a high-profile killing in France took place.
---
